user.title: Select Battery Type
user.description: Choose the type of battery you want to connect to Battery Optimizer Light Plus.

sonnen.title: Configure Sonnen
sonnen.description: Enter the connection details for your Sonnen battery.

data_description.host: Enter the IP address of your Sonnen battery (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.api_token: Copy your Auth-Token from the battery's local web page under 'Software Integration' -> 'JSON API'.

huawei.title: Configure Huawei
huawei.description: Select the devices and entities for your Huawei system.

data_description.battery_device_id: Select your Huawei battery or inverter from the list so the integration knows where to send commands.

common.title: Common Settings
common.description: Enter your API key for Battery Optimizer Light Plus. (If using Huawei or Generic, also select your sensors below).

data.grid_sensor_invert: Invert Grid Sensor? (Check if positive value = Export)
data.battery_sensor_invert: Invert Battery Sensor? (Check if positive value = Charging)

data_description.api_url: Leave the default value unless you are connecting to a custom test server.
data_description.api_key: Found when you log in to battery-prod.awestinconsulting.se
data_description.soc_sensor: The sensor displaying the battery's current charge percentage (0-100%).
data_description.grid_sensor: The meter for the house's grid exchange. Usually from your inverter (W).
data_description.grid_sensor_invert: Check this if your Grid Sensor shows a POSITIVE value when you export/sell electricity.
data_description.battery_power_sensor: The sensor for the battery's power (Negative = charging, Positive = discharging).
data_description.battery_sensor_invert: Check this if your battery sensor shows a POSITIVE value when charging and NEGATIVE when discharging (e.g., standard for Huawei).
data_description.virtual_load_sensor: Leave empty to let the integration calculate the load automatically (Grid + Battery).
data_description.working_mode_entity: Select the working mode entity (e.g., 'select.inverter_working_mode'). Used to switch between Auto and Hold.
data_description.device_status_entity: Select the status sensor (e.g., 'sensor.inverter_device_status') to allow PeakGuard to automatically detect errors and maintenance modes.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Update sensors and configuration for Battery Optimizer Light Plus.

data_description.api_url: Leave the default value unless you are connecting to a custom test server.

data_description.grid_sensor: The meter for the house's grid exchange. Usually from your inverter (W).
